name: Rolled Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter until softened.
3. Add sugar and beat until fluffy.
4. Add egg, milk, and vanilla; beat well.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture; beat until well combined.
6. Divide dough in half and cover. Chill at least 3 hours or until easy to handle.
7. Roll dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
8. Cut with cookie cutters and place on an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Bake in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for 7-8 minutes, or until done.
10. Remove from the oven and cool as desired before decorating.
Makes 36 to 48 cookies.
CREAMY DECORATIVE ICING
In a small mixing bowl, beat one egg white with 1 tablespoon lemon juice or vanilla.
Add enough powdered sugar (1 1/2 to 2 cups) until the icing reaches a piping consistency. If desired, stir in food coloring.
